description:
The GiggleTechSettings Component is used to control different aspects of giggle pucks for use in Resonite.

See Settings for information.

fields.Devices: A list of giggle pucks with settings for them.
fields.GigglePuckIP: the IP address of the giggle puck.
fields.IsGigglePuckValid: Whether the giggle puck is valid and tracking.

methods.RegisterGigglePuck: Register a gigglepuck to the list
methods.GetDeviceForSubsetting: Get one of the ``Devices`` by key.
